Class AbstractImmutableCharObjectMap<V>

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.collections.impl.map.immutable.primitive.AbstractImmutableCharObjectMap<V>
All Implemented Interfaces:
Iterable<V>, InternalIterable<V>, CharObjectMap<V>, ImmutableCharObjectMap<V>, ImmutablePrimitiveObjectMap<V>, PrimitiveObjectMap<V>, RichIterable<V>
